name: localvision
description: Local vision-language model tools backed by a local llama.cpp subprocess. Provides 10 image-analysis tools (read_image, extract_text, extract_code, extract_table, describe_ui, describe_diagram, describe_chart, diagnose_error, image_to_prompt, compare_images) for text-only coding LLMs. Each call loads a vision model and runs one inference — budget 30-60 seconds per call.
